input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.9.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.9.4.2
            TITLE: location – the cockpit main switch must be:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.9.4.2: Location – The Cockpit Main Switch must be:
IC.9.4.2 Location – The Cockpit Main Switch must be: 
a. In easy reach of the driver when in a normal driving position wearing Harness  
b. Adjacent to the Steering Wheel 
c. Unobstructed by the Steering Wheel or any other part of the vehicle

final_answer: rule IC.9.4.2: Location – The Cockpit Main Switch must be: a. In easy reach of the driver when in a normal driving position wearing Harness b. Adjacent to the Steering Wheel c. Unobstructed by the Steering Wheel or any other part of the vehicle
